intro: Sphaerostigma parvulum, also known as Australian finger lily or finger lily, is a plant species in the family Haemodoraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
